steps.t: Talan Brethil is to the south-east of Talan Revail, along the banks of the Anduin. Talan Gwilith and Talan Fanuidhol are well west and a bit south of …
Cúvroval is at Talan Revail, north-east of Cerin Amroth. You should return to Cúvroval to report that empty skies were all you saw from the telain.
